chat:edit.desc: Send live Stream Chat and Rooms messages.
chat:edit.tooltip: Used to send responses in chat.

chat:read.desc: View live Stream Chat and Rooms messages.
chat:read.tooltip: Used to login to chat and read messages.

moderator:manage:announcements.desc: Send announcements in channels where you have the moderator role.

moderator:manage:banned_users.tooltip: Used to ban, timeout, and unban users.

moderator:manage:chat_messages.desc: Delete chat messages in channels where you have the moderator role.
moderator:manage:chat_messages.tooltip: Used to delete individual messages or clear the entire chat.

moderator:manage:chat_settings.desc: Manage a broadcaster's chat room settings.
moderator:manage:chat_settings.tooltip: Used to enable/disable emote-only, follower-only, slow, subscriber-only, and unique (r9k) chat modes.

user:manage:whispers.desc: Read whispers that you send and receive, and send whispers on your behalf.
user:manage:whispers.tooltip: Used to send whispers from the bot.

whispers:read.tooltip: Used to receive whispers to the bot.
